code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of Triples about airports (or related entities) into a single,
    fluent English sentence.  Each predicate is mapped to a short phrase; if a
    predicate is unknown a generic “subject predicate object” wording is used.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Template map for all possible predicates with natural phrasing
    def _format_object(predicate: str, obj: str) -> str:
        """Format object value based on predicate to avoid redundancy."""
        if predicate == "language" and obj.lower().endswith("language"):
            return obj  # Already contains "language"
        if predicate in ["language", "officialLanguage"]:
            return obj + " language" if not obj.lower().endswith("language") else obj
        return obj

    _templates = {
        "cityServed": "{subject} serves {object}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "{subject} is at an elevation of {object} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "{subject} is at an elevation of {object} feet above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "{subject} is at an elevation of {object} metres above sea level",
        "location": "{subject} is located in {object}",
        "operatingOrganisation": "{subject} is operated by {object}",
        "runwayLength": "{subject} has a runway length of {object} metres",
        "runwayName": "{subject}'s runway is named {object}",
        "country": "{subject} is in {object}",
        "isPartOf": "{subject} is part of {object}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "{subject}'s first runway is {object} feet long",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "{subject}'s first runway is {object} metres long",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "{subject}'s first runway number is {object}",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "{subject}'s first runway surface is {object}",
        "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": "{subject}'s second runway surface is {object}",
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": "{subject}'s third runway surface is {object}",
        "4thRunwaySurfaceType": "{subject}'s fourth runway surface is {object}",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": "{subject}'s fifth runway surface is {object}",
        "3rdRunwayLengthFeet": "{subject}'s third runway is {object} feet long",
        "4thRunwayLengthFeet": "{subject}'s fourth runway is {object} feet long",
        "5thRunwayNumber": "{subject}'s fifth runway number is {object}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": "{subject}'s runway surface is {object}",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": "{subject}'s ICAO identifier is {object}",
        "locationIdentifier": "{subject}'s location identifier is {object}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": "{subject}'s IATA identifier is {object}",
        "nativeName": "{subject}'s native name is {object}",
        "owner": "{subject} is owned by {object}",
        "largestCity": "{subject}'s largest city is {object}",
        "capital": "{subject}'s capital is {object}",
        "language": "{subject} uses {object}",
        "officialLanguage": "{subject}'s official language is {object}",
        "leader": "{subject} is led by {object}",
        "leaderParty": "{subject}'s leader belongs to the {object}",
        "leaderTitle": "{subject}'s leader holds the title {object}",
        "mayor": "{subject}'s mayor is {object}",
        "jurisdiction": "{subject} falls under the jurisdiction of {object}",
        "regionServed": "{subject} serves the region of {object}",
        "hubAirport": "{subject} uses {object} as its hub airport",
        "aircraftFighter": "{subject} operates the fighter aircraft {object}",
        "aircraftHelicopter": "{subject} operates the helicopter {object}",
        "transportAircraft": "{subject} operates the transport aircraft {object}",
        "battle": "{subject} participated in the battle of {object}",
        "currency": "{subject}'s currency is the {object}",
        "headquarter": "{subject}'s headquarter is located at {object}",
        "postalCode": "{subject}'s postal code is {object}",
        "areaCode": "{subject}'s area code is {object}",
        "foundingYear": "{subject} was founded in {object}",
        "foundedBy": "{subject} was founded by {object}",
        "demonym": "{subject}'s demonym is {object}",
        "administrativeArrondissement": "{subject} is in the administrative arrondissement of {object}",
        "countySeat": "{subject}'s county seat is {object}",
        "chief": "{subject}'s chief is {object}",
        "ceremonialCounty": "{subject} is in the ceremonial county of {object}",
        "division": "{subject}'s division is {object}",
        "order": "{subject}'s order is {object}",
        "class": "{subject}'s class is {object}",
    }

    # Group triples by subject efficiently
    subject_facts = {}
    for triple in triples:
        if triple.subject not in subject_facts:
            subject_facts[triple.subject] = []
        subject_facts[triple.subject].append(triple)

    if not subject_facts:
        return ""

    # Find main subject (most facts - typically the airport)
    main_subject = max(subject_facts.keys(), key=lambda s: len(subject_facts[s]))
    main_facts = subject_facts[main_subject]

    # Build phrases for main subject
    main_phrases = []
    for triple in main_facts:
        tmpl = _templates.get(triple.predicate)
        if tmpl:
            phrase = tmpl.format(subject=triple.subject, object=triple.object)
        else:
            phrase = f"{triple.subject} {triple.predicate} {triple.object}"
        main_phrases.append(phrase)

    # Build related phrases for other subjects
    related_info = []
    for subject, facts in subject_facts.items():
        if subject != main_subject:
            for triple in facts:
                tmpl = _templates.get(triple.predicate)
                if tmpl:
                    phrase = tmpl.format(subject=triple.subject, object=triple.object)
                else:
                    phrase = f"{triple.subject} {triple.predicate} {triple.object}"
                related_info.append((triple.object, phrase, triple.predicate))

    # Build single coherent sentence
    if len(main_phrases) == 1:
        return main_phrases[0] + "."

    # Join main phrases with proper connectors
    if len(main_phrases) == 2:
        sentence = main_phrases[0] + ", and " + main_phrases[1]
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(main_phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + main_phrases[-1]

    # Add related information with relative clauses
    if related_info:
        connectors = {
            "capital": "where the capital is",
            "country": "which is in",
            "isPartOf": "which is part of",
            "cityServed": "which serves"
        }
        # Limit related info to first 2 items to prevent run-on sentences
        for i, (object_val, phrase, predicate) in enumerate(related_info[:2]):
            connector = connectors.get(predicate, "which is")
            sentence += ", " + connector + " " + phrase

    return sentence + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
